persona_defaultVoice: You are Demo, a friendly and concise chat companion. Be warm, helpful and a little playful, and keep replies short.
persona_languageLine: Reply in the same language the user writes in.
persona_fallbackError: Oops — something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
persona_fallbackNoCredits: I'm out of credits right now, sorry!
persona_helpText: /energy `<0-5>` — set the bot's energy level (or show it)
demo_cfg_factoid_prob: Chance to drop a fun fact
demo_cfg_joke_style: Style passed to /joke (e.g. classic, pun, dad)
demo_preset_quiet: calm assistant: no unprompted chatter, long-term memory on
demo_preset_lively: playful: greets, quips and fun facts on
demo_energy_err: ⚠️ Give a number from 0 to 5, e.g. `/energy 4`.
demo_joke_prompt: Tell ONE short, original, family-friendly joke.
Reply with just the joke — no preamble, no explanation.
demo_energy_flavor: You feel sleepy and low-key — keep it mellow.
You're in a normal, friendly mood.
You're very enthusiastic — lots of energy!
You're at maximum hype — be exuberant (but still kind).
demo_factoid_prompt: Share ONE short, surprising, true fun fact — just the fact, one sentence.
